content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

August 23, 2001

Michael D. Milich
Office of the City Attorney
City of Modesto
Post Office Box 642
Modesto, CA 95353

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-131

Dear Mr. Milich:

We have received your May 29, 2001 request for advice on behalf of Councilmember Bill Conrad regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 As mentioned in our telephone conversation and subsequent written correspondence, additional information was necessary for us to respond to your request for advice. The Commission may decline to render advice if it appears that the material facts provided in the request may be inaccurate, incomplete, or in dispute. (A copy of Regulation 18329(b)(8) is enclosed.)

In light of your lack of response to our request for additional information, we have determined that your request does not provide the material facts needed by us to render advice to you. Consequently, the Commission declines to issue advice on this matter.

Please do not hesitate to resubmit this as a new request for advice if you should obtain the additional information.

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William L. Williams, Jr.
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure

WLW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\01-131
